race.comment: IBERIAN LYNX (3) looks the one to beat. The well-related gelding has been in the minor money in both runs back, trying hard in a stronger maiden at Bendigo when in the market last time out. Drawn wide here but will roll forward and give a huge sight. AZULITA (10) is lining up for her third career start, solid on debut before an even effort last time at Bendigo when fifth. This looks a touch easier and she's open to further improvement. I'LBERIDIN'SHOTGUN (2) presents third up having run on well for second at Donald last start. Drawn to get right back again but has each-way claims. YOU SAID WHAT (13) is knocking on the door this time in and sets up well to go one better.
